zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilla de Terrington於1246年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特林頓 聖 克萊門特時，她的父親Sir William de Terrington27歲，母親Mrs Gilla de Terrington24歲。她於1276年之前與Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1310年7月16日享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilla de Terrington于1246年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可特林頓 聖 克萊門特时，她的父亲Sir William de Terrington27岁，母亲Mrs Gilla de Terrington24岁。她于1276年之前与Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1310年7月16日享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

nameMeanings.name: Terrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name, in S Lincs and E Anglia a variant of   Torrington   (2).
2  English: locative name in N England from Terrington (NR Yorks).

variants.name: Tarrington
meanings: 1  English: locative name, variant of   Torrington  .

2  English: locative name, perhaps sometimes from Tarrington (Herefs), but there is no clear link between the 1379 example and the 18th-century Staffs and Lancs name cited below, which may instead belong with (1).

variants.name: Torrington
meanings: 1  English: locative name, mainly from Black, Great, or Little Torrington (Devon).

2 English: in Lincs and E Anglia from East or West Torrington (Lincs), recorded as Terintone in 1086 and Tiringtuna about 1115, or from Terrington (Norfolk), recorded as Tirintuna between 1103 and 1131.

nameMeanings.name: Gilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Priscilla  , associated chiefly with the Liverpudlian singer and TV personality  Cilla Black  (  b. 1943 ), whose real name is  Priscilla White .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilla de Terrington was born in 1246, in Terrington St Clement, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Terrington, was 27 and her mother, Mrs Gilla de Terrington, was 24. She married Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas before 1276, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 16 July 1310, at the age of 64, and was buried in East Winch, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Terrington Saint Clement, Norfolkshire,: Terrington St Clement, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilla de Terrington est née en 1246, à Terrington St Clement, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Terrington, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Gilla de Terrington, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas avant 1276, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 juillet 1310, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à East Winch, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilla de Terrington 1246 in Terrington St Clement, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Terrington 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs Gilla de Terrington 24. Sie hat vor 1276 in England Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 16. Juli 1310 im Alter von 64 Jahren und wurde in East Winch, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilla de Terrington è nata il nel 1246 nel Terrington St Clement, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Terrington, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs Gilla de Terrington, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas prima del 1276, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 16 luglio 1310, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a East Winch, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilla de Terringtonが1246年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクテリントン スト クレメントで生まれた時，父Sir William de Terringtonは27歳，母Mrs Gilla de Terringtonは24歳であった。1276年以前にイギリスでSir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1310年7月16日に64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ウィンチにて埋葬された。

ko.Terrington Saint Clement, Norfolkshire,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테링턴 스트 클레멘트
ko.lifeSummary: Gilla de Terrington(이)가 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테링턴 스트 클레멘트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Terrington(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Gilla de Terrington(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1276년 이전 영국에서 Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 7월 16일 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 윈치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas antes 1276, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.Terrington Saint Clement, Norfolkshire,: тиррингтон ст клемент, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilla de Terrington родилась в 1246 г. в местности тиррингтон ст клемент, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Terrington было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Gilla de Terrington, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas перед 1276 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 16 июля 1310 г. в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст винч, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
